Congratulation! We're glad to inform that you have passed the initial screening stage of our EY Campus Programs and now you will be proceeded to the next stage, i.e. EY Online Assessment. Please click the link enclosed for the assessment and you are expected to complete it within 48 hours after receiving this email.

The assessment will be divided into 3 sessions and it will take approximately one hour for completion:
1. General Mental Ability test
(Time limit: 20 mins / Calculator and draft papers are needed for the numerical session);

2. Behavioral Inclination Questionnaire
(Recommend completing it within 20 mins)

3. Occupational Interests Questionnaire
(Recommend completing it within 10 mins)


Reminders before the assessment:
1. For Behavioral Inclination Questionnaire and Occupational Interests Questionnaire sessions, which assess your daily life activities and behaviors, there is no absolute answer. While completing these tests, please do not overthink and just select the option in a realistic and instinctive manner.

2. You are required to use a computer / laptop to complete the assessment and please make sure your device and network supports:
① Operating System: Windows 7 and above/ Apple Mac
② Browser: IE 10 and above/ Chrome (Recommended)/ Firefox (Recommended)
③ Bandwidth：2M and above

3. You are required to turn on the camera during the assessment. Before kicking start your assessment, please make sure that you authorize the system to access/detect the camera so that system can make the necessary adjustments beforehand.

4. Please make sure you conduct the assessment with a stable network. If you are disconnected during the assessment, you can simply re-connect and continue your answer in the page or re-login the assessment through the LINK. When you completed all tests, the system will guide you on the answers submission operation.
